body.title: Rename local dir + migrate CC memory to UnseenUniversity path
body.result: Repo dir renamed /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter → /home/akien/dev/src/UnseenUniversity; runtime ~/.agent_datacenter → ~/.unseen_university; TheIgors symlink updated
body.description:
Rename ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter to ~/dev/src/UnseenUniversity on disk and migrate Claude Code's project memory from ~/.claude/projects/-home-akien-dev-src-agent_datacenter/ to -home-akien-dev-src-UnseenUniversity/. Update any shell aliases or tmux configs referencing the old path. Gated on T-codebase-refs-adc-to-uu so source is clean before the path changes.

**Affected files:** Filesystem paths only; ~/.claude/projects/ memory directory (MEMORY.md + *.md memory files)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Local filesystem rename + CC memory migration; no source file content changes (those are in T-codebase-refs-adc-to-uu)
**Test plan:** `ls ~/dev/src/UnseenUniversity` succeeds; CC memory loads correctly in new path; `ls ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter` returns not-found; no broken symlinks
